title: Knighthood conferred: Mr Justice Keehan
body: "The Queen has been pleased to approve that the honour of Knighthood be conferred upon Mr Justice Keehan, Esquire, QC on his appointment as a Justice of the High Court.  Notes for editors  Mr Justice Keehan was called to the Bar by the Middle Temple in 1982 and took Silk in 2001. He was appointed a Recorder in 2000. "
